purpose: Record a focused recheck of PR-130 hard blockers while continuing real-source data acquisition. This file must not be merged into calendar records.

rechecks.current_progress: 16 of 18 official HRNZ June rows can now be mapped to racecourses after Winton was source-verified as Central Southland Raceway.
rechecks.reason: The HRNZ racing dates table is club-based. Invercargill and Forbury club pages were checked, but fetched official text does not name the exact 2026-06 racecourse. Forbury Park Raceway is closed, so venue inference remains prohibited.
Additional searches returned only partial major-race snippets or login/JS-gated routes, not a complete official no-login 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse calendar.
The official GNT page route is present but captured text exposes navigation only; secondary snippets identify selected GNT stages but not a complete official June 2026 LeTROT calendar.

Additional national/state searches did not reveal a no-login full-month official source for the missing 2026-06-14 through 2026-06-30 range. Existing Racing Australia routes remain visible-window only in captured text.

promotion_status.reason: No new complete official meeting_date + racecourse row set was captured for these blocked groups during this pass.

next_targets: Find HRNZ programme URLs or official Southern Harness pages that explicitly name Invercargill and Forbury 2026-06 racecourses.
Find a France Galop no-login month export or official PDF containing all June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
Find a LeTROT no-login month export/API/PDF containing all June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
Find Australian state authority month-capable fixture pages for the missing 2026-06-14 through 2026-06-30 range.
